sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92342" key="r(hci/noos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥηξί-νοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92342.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breaking the wits</tr_>, of Dionysus, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">524.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
